desc: Aged 100% blue agave tequila from 1800 Tequila, aged in French oak barrels. Offers smooth notes of caramel, vanilla, and spice. Standard 38% ABV.
From the 1800 brand, this 38% ABV reposado tequila is aged in oak barrels. It presents a smooth profile with cooked agave, caramel, and vanilla notes, characteristic of its aging.
1800 Tequila brand. A 38% ABV unaged silver tequila made from 100% Weber Blue Agave, double-distilled for a crisp, clean, and balanced flavor profile.
An unaged, crystal-clear Blanco tequila from Kendall Jenner's 818 brand, distilled in Jalisco, Mexico. Offers crisp agave, citrus, and a smooth finish. 40% ABV.
818 Reposado is a premium agave tequila, aged in oak barrels for a smooth character with notes of vanilla, caramel, and cooked agave. Standard 40% ABV.
AC/DC Tequila Blanco is an unaged Mexican spirit from blue agave, offering crisp agave notes with hints of citrus and pepper. 40% ABV.
Adiccion's 40% ABV reposado tequila. Aged 2-11 months in oak barrels, it presents mellow agave, vanilla, and oak undertones.
Aman is a Mexican tequila crafted from 100% blue agave, bottled at 40% ABV. This unaged Blanco expression offers a crisp, pure agave flavor profile.
Aman is a premium reposado tequila, aged 2-11 months in oak barrels. Crafted from 100% blue agave, it delivers notes of cooked agave, vanilla, and caramel with a 40% ABV.
An Anejo aged spirit by Casa De Hamsa (38% ABV), offering a smooth, rich profile with oak, caramel, and vanilla notes from barrel maturation.
Casa De Hamsa is an unaged, clear agave spirit at 38% ABV, offering crisp, vibrant notes of agave with hints of citrus and earth, ideal for sipping or cocktails.
Casa De Hamsa brand, 38% ABV aged tequila. Matured in oak barrels for a smooth profile with hints of vanilla, caramel, and oak.
Casa Dragones produces a small-batch, smooth anejo tequila. Aged for richness, it offers notes of vanilla, caramel, and oak, with a 40% ABV.
A small-batch 100% Blue Agave blanco tequila by Casa Dragones, unaged for a pure, crisp profile. Expect bright agave, citrus, and peppery notes. 40% ABV.
Casa Dragones is a 40% Reposado Tequila, aged in new American oak & finished in Japanese Mizunara oak, offering vanilla, butterscotch & subtle spice notes.
Casamigos, a 40% ABV Anejo Tequila, is aged 12-18 months in American white oak. Delivers notes of caramel, vanilla, and spice with a smooth agave finish.
Casamigos is a premium unaged Blanco tequila from Mexico, 40% ABV. Crafted from 100% Blue Weber agave, it offers crisp citrus, sweet agave, and subtle vanilla notes.
Casamigos 40% ABV tequila, aged 7 months in American oak. A smooth spirit with notes of caramel, vanilla, and a hint of spice, crafted from 100% blue Weber agave.
Premium Tequila, 40% ABV, made from 100% blue Weber agave and aged over a year in American oak. Exhibits rich notes of vanilla, oak, and cooked agave.
A 40% ABV premium tequila by Cenote, it's an Añejo aged in American oak and charcoal-filtered for clarity. Delivers complex vanilla, caramel, and citrus notes with a smooth finish.
Cenote is a premium 40% Reposado tequila, aged in American oak. Crafted from 100% blue Weber agave, offering notes of cooked agave, vanilla, and oak spice.
This 40% ABV premium unaged tequila from Cenote is crafted from 100% blue weber agave. It delivers vibrant notes of citrus, pepper, and cooked agave, with a smooth finish.
Clase Azul, a premium 100% Blue Weber Agave Reposado tequila from Mexico, aged 8 months in oak. Offers notes of cooked agave, fruit, vanilla, and caramel. ABV 40%.
Clase Azul Durango is a premium mezcal from Durango, Mexico, featuring 44% ABV. Crafted from Cenizo agave, slow-cooked for smoky, mineral, and earthy notes.
Clase Azul's premium 40% ABV tequila, blending Joven and an Añejo. It offers a smooth profile with notes of cooked agave, vanilla, and caramel from aging.
Clase Azul premium mezcal, 42% ABV. Handcrafted in Guerrero, it features smoky, earthy notes with hints of fruit, showcasing traditional agave distillation.
Clase Azul Tequila Plata is an unaged premium blanco tequila from Jalisco, Mexico, made from 100% Blue Weber agave. Bottled at 40% ABV, it offers fresh agave, citrus, and sweet notes.
Clase Azul's premium reposado tequila, 40% ABV, made from 100% Blue Weber Agave, aged 8 months in whiskey barrels. Smooth, with notes of vanilla, caramel, and agave.
Clase Azul's exquisite 40% ABV Extra Añejo tequila, aged meticulously to develop rich notes of maple, vanilla, and cherry, delivering a profound and luxurious sipping experience.
This Añejo Tequila by Codigo 1530, 38% ABV, is oak-aged, delivering vanilla, caramel, and oak notes with cooked agave essence. Smooth finish.
Codigo 1530's barrel-strength Anejo tequila. Aged in oak barrels, it offers a rich, complex profile of cooked agave, vanilla, and caramel at 44% ABV.
Brand Codigo 1530, 38% ABV. This unaged 100% blue weber agave tequila offers a crisp, clean profile with bright agave and earthy notes.
Codigo 1530 Tequila, 38% ABV. This reposado is aged in barrels, presenting a smooth profile with notes of vanilla, caramel, and a rich agave character.
Premium Tequila, 38% ABV. Rested in French white oak Cabernet barrels, offering light floral and red berry notes with a sweet agave finish.
Añejo expression from Corralejo, 38% ABV. This tequila is aged in oak barrels for 1-3 years, showcasing rich notes of vanilla, caramel, and spice from 100% blue agave.
Corralejo Reposado is a tequila, 38% ABV, aged in oak barrels for a smooth character with notes of cooked agave, vanilla, and hints of spice.
Don Angel Blanco Tequila is an unaged Mexican spirit made from blue Weber agave, featuring a 38% ABV with prominent agave, citrus, and peppery notes.
Don Angel's golden mixto tequila, typically 38% ABV, often colored with caramel. It delivers a smooth profile with sweet notes of cooked agave, vanilla, and a hint of oak.
Don Julio Añejo Tequila, aged 2.5 years from 100% blue agave. Smooth with notes of caramel, vanilla, and warm oak spice. 38% ABV.
Don Julio ultra-premium tequila, 40% ABV. Finished in ruby-red rosé wine casks, offering notes of red fruit, agave, and spice. Luxurious and smooth.
Don Julio's Cristalino Añejo tequila, aged 18 months and charcoal filtered. Delivers a smooth profile of cooked agave, vanilla, and oak with a crisp finish. 35% ABV.
Don Julio's premium tequila, crafted from 100% blue agave and aged at least one year in oak barrels. Offers notes of cooked agave, vanilla, and caramel. Typically 38% ABV.
Don Julio's unaged, 100% blue Weber agave tequila, 40% ABV. Crisp agave and citrus notes with a hint of black pepper for a smooth finish.
Don Julio's premium tequila, aged 8 months in oak barrels. Crafted from 100% blue Weber agave, offering smooth notes of citrus, honey, and spice. Typically 38-40% ABV.
Premium Herradura tequila, aged 1-3 years in oak barrels, delivering rich notes of cooked agave, vanilla, caramel, and spice. Standard 40% ABV.
Herradura's 100% blue agave unaged tequila from Mexico, offering a clean, crisp profile with notes of cooked agave, citrus, and black pepper. 40% ABV.
Herradura is a 40% ABV reposado tequila, aged 11 months in oak barrels. It offers a smooth profile with cooked agave, vanilla, and hints of spice.
Jose Cuervo's gold reposado tequila, aged in oak barrels. Offers notes of agave, caramel, and vanilla. Typically 38% ABV.
Jose Cuervo's unaged Silver Tequila, 38% ABV. Crafted from blue agave, offering a crisp, clean profile with notes of citrus and fresh herbs. Ideal for cocktails.
Kah brand Añejo Tequila, aged 1-3 years in oak barrels. Crafted from 100% blue agave, offering a smooth profile with notes of vanilla, caramel, and spice. Standard 40% ABV.
Kah is a 40% ABV Mexican tequila, rested in oak barrels for 2-11 months. Crafted from 100% Blue Weber agave, it offers notes of cooked agave, vanilla, and caramel.
Kah is an unaged 100% Blue Weber Agave Tequila Blanco, typically 40% ABV. It offers bright, sweet agave, citrus, and herbal notes, ideal for cocktails or neat enjoyment.
This premium Añejo Tequila from Don Julio boasts 38% ABV, crafted from 100% Blue Weber Agave and aged over 2.5 years. Expect rich notes of caramel, vanilla, and roasted agave.
Patron Tequila. Unaged, 40% ABV. Crafted from 100% Weber Blue Agave in Jalisco, Mexico. Known for its smooth profile with notes of sweet agave, citrus, and a light peppery finish.
This 38% Reposado Tequila from Olmeca Altos is 100% blue agave, aged in oak barrels. Offers smooth citrus, vanilla, and cooked agave notes.
Olmeca Altos is an unaged 100% Blue Agave tequila from Jalisco, Mexico, bottled at 38% ABV. Double distilled in copper pot stills, it offers smooth citrus, herbal, and cooked agave notes.
Olmeca gold tequila, 35% ABV. A smooth mixto tequila from Jalisco, Mexico, featuring sweet caramel, citrus, and spicy notes, ideal for mixing cocktails.
Olmeca's unaged Blanco tequila, made from blue agave, offers 35% ABV. Known for fresh agave, citrus, and herbal notes, ideal for cocktails.
Padre Azul offers a premium Anejo Tequila, aged 1-3 years in oak barrels. Bottled at 40% ABV, it features a rich profile of cooked agave, vanilla, caramel, and spice.
This Blanco Tequila from Padre Azul is unaged, bottled at 40% ABV. It offers a crisp, clear agave profile with vibrant citrus and herbal undertones.
Padre Azul 40% ABV Reposado Tequila, oak-aged for smoothness with vanilla and caramel notes.
Patron is a premium 100% Agave Tequila from Mexico, aged for over a year in oak barrels. Boasting a 40% ABV, it offers a smooth profile with notes of vanilla, caramel, and oak.
Patron's premium orange liqueur, distilled from the finest oranges at 35% ABV, offering a sweet and vibrant citrus flavor.
Patron Extra Añejo tequila, crafted from 100% Weber Blue Agave, aged in oak. A smooth, rich 40% ABV spirit with notes of cooked agave, vanilla, & caramel.
Patron's prestige unaged silver tequila, El Cielo, 40% ABV. Quadruple-distilled from 100% blue Weber agave for an ultra-smooth, crisp profile.
Patron's exquisite 40% Extra Añejo tequila, crafted from 100% Weber Blue Agave and aged over 3 years in oak. Features notes of sweet agave, fruit, and oak.
Patron's ultra-premium triple-distilled Tequila, crafted from 100% Weber Blue Agave. It delivers an exceptionally smooth and complex profile with hints of light citrus and fresh agave. 40% ABV.
Premium Patron Tequila, 40% ABV. Aged 2-12 months in oak barrels for a smooth character with fresh agave, oak, citrus, and a hint of spice.
Patron's unaged tequila, crafted from 100% Weber Blue Agave, delivers a smooth, clean taste with fresh agave and citrus notes. 40% ABV.
A dry, coffee-flavored liqueur blending Patron Silver Tequila with coffee essence. It offers notes of fresh roasted coffee, chocolate, and vanilla with a 35% ABV.
A Mexican Anejo Tequila, Rooster Rojo is aged in oak barrels for over a year, offering a smooth taste with notes of vanilla, caramel, and cooked agave at 38% ABV.
A coffee-flavored tequila liqueur by Sierra, crafted with an authentic tequila base and coffee extracts. It offers a smooth, rich taste with prominent coffee notes at 25% ABV.
Sierra Reposado, a 38% ABV tequila aged in oak barrels. Delivers mellow agave flavors with subtle caramel and vanilla notes.
From Sierra, a clear, unaged Blanco tequila (38% ABV) from Mexico. Offers crisp, fresh agave notes with a fruity essence, often used in mixed drinks.
A distinctive cream liqueur (15% ABV) from Tequila Rose, blending Mexican tequila with real dairy cream and sweet strawberry flavor.
Volcan De Mi Tierra offers an unaged, 40% ABV Blanco tequila crafted from blue Weber agave, known for its pure, crisp taste with citrus, herbal, and black pepper notes.

product_name: Volcan De Mi Tierra Reposado Cristalino
desc: Volcan De Mi Tierra's 40% Tequila. Aged reposado, charcoal-filtered to be cristalino. Presents a smooth profile with agave, vanilla, and subtle oak notes.
Premium Reposado Tequila by Volcan De Mi Tierra, 40% ABV. Aged in oak, offering smooth vanilla, caramel, and oak notes.
